Name: wb_gpio.wb_we_i
Description: Qualifies Wishbone write transactions; when asserted with cyc/stb, it causes writes to either the GPIO data register or direction register depending on the address.

Name: wb_gpio.gpio_dir_o
Description: Per-bit pin direction control; ‘1’ sets a pin as output, ‘0’ as input. Written via the Wishbone interface.

Name: wb_gpio.wb_err_o
Description: Wishbone error signal. In this wb_gpio implementation it is hard-wired low (tie-off), i.e., `assign wb_err_o = 0;`, while acknowledge is generated from the handshake (`wb_cyc_i & wb_stb_i`) in a clocked process.

Name: wb_gpio.wb_stb_i
Description: Indicates a valid data transfer; together with cyc_i (and we_i for writes) it triggers register accesses and drives ack generation.

Name: wb_gpio.wb_ack_o
Description: Signals transaction completion; asserted for one cycle following a valid cyc/stb.
